Headline: Kościerska Huta
Description: Kościerska Huta [kɔɕˈt͡ɕɛrska ˈxuta] is a village in the administrative district of Gmina Kościerzyna, within Kościerzyna County, Pomeranian Voivodeship, in northern Poland.[1]

Headline: Jacek Trela
Description: Jacek Szczęsny Trela (born 30 August 1956 in Warsaw) is a Polish lawyer, politician, and member of the 11th term of the Polish Senate. Between 2016 and 2021, he was the chairman of the Supreme Bar Council [pl].

Headline: The lady doth protest too much, methinks
Description: "The lady doth protest too much, methinks" is a line from the play Hamlet by William Shakespeare. It is spoken by Queen Gertrude in response to the insincere overacting of a character in the play within a play created by Prince Hamlet to elicit evidence of his uncle's guilt in the murder of his father, the King of Denmark.

Headline: Biernatki, Poznań County
Description: Biernatki [bjɛrˈnatki] is a village in the administrative district of Gmina Kórnik, within Poznań County, Greater Poland Voivodeship, in west-central Poland.[1]

Headline: Waubujejack
Description: Waubujejack was an Ojibwe chief of the Crane clan who lived near Chequamegon Bay. Since he was chief through descent he gained respect among the Ojibwe, despite this he was neglectful of his duties as chief.
